title: GliaOutput
description: What Gemini returns for a shared discussion room

total_responses.description: Total number of distinct participant responses analyzed

summary.description: One concise sentence summarizing the participant's response

choice.description: The participant's declared answer to the host statement

support_score.description: AI-estimated support score on a 0-100 scale informed by the response content and secondary reactions

yes_count.description: Number of participants who reacted yes to this specific response

neutral_count.description: Number of participants who reacted neutral to this specific response

no_count.description: Number of participants who reacted no to this specific response

camps.description: The identified response groups (usually 2-3 concise camps)

position.description: One concise sentence describing what this camp wants

supporter_count.description: Estimated number of people in this camp

reasons.description: 1-3 short reasons this camp holds its position

sentiment.description: Overall sentiment intensity of this camp

representative_quotes.description: At most 1-2 short input quotes that represent this camp

spectrum.description: Response distribution for the visual spectrum bar

mention_count.description: Approximate number of responses that mention the theme

key_themes.description: Most mentioned themes across all responses, expressed as short phrases

summary.description: One concise sentence describing the compromise

details.description: At most 2 short sentences explaining the compromise

camp.description: Camp label from the camps array that this compromise point addresses

how_addressed.description: One short sentence describing how the compromise addresses that camp

addresses.description: How this compromise addresses each camp's concerns
